description: A candid color event photograph (no on-image text, logos, or graphic design) of an outdoor dinner at the White House Rose Garden at dusk. The foreground shows President Trump from behind (silver hair, dark suit) seated at the head of a long white-linened table; around him several men in dark suits and ties smile toward him, two of them wearing cowboy hats and what appear to be sheriff/law-enforcement badges, with table lamps, wine glasses and phones on the table. Behind, many more guests are seated at additional tables on the patio, with the White House facade, floral plantings, and a bronze statue in the background. This accompanies the 'BACK THE BLUE' National Police Week tweet.
